name: Exile Target Eternity
text:
Exile target eternity. There was only the one. It does not come back; that was rather the point of it.
With eternity exiled, time is now finite and the Doomsday Clock has somewhere to be. Set it to midnight and let it strike.
Scry your soul, then draw a conclusion. The conclusion is foregone. It was always foregone. You drew it anyway, out of habit.
the game continues, briefly, out of momentum, like a wheel after the cart is gone.
flavorText: Monday looked for forever and found only a Tuesday-shaped hole, and then the hole closed.

extras.pairsWith: Exile Target Tuesday from the rival deck
